preferred_presidential_aspirant.description: A direct or near-direct national preference measure for presidential aspirants/candidates.

preferred_presidential_candidate.description: A direct national presidential vote/preference measure.

popularity_rating.description: Use with horse-race polls only when the question text clearly indicates candidate preference/popularity in the presidential context.

approval_rating.description: Approval/performance ratings must not be blended with vote intention or aspirant-preference polls.
